items.title: Senior Software Engineer [Remote]
items.description:
Get Paid to Train AI at Your Own Pace
Help shape the future of AI models designed for software development. 
In this role, you will be responsible for reviewing and validating code challenges in Python, JavaScript, and other languages, ensuring technical accuracy, real-world applicability, and the highest standard of data quality for AI training systems.

About the Project:
The focus of this project is the technical review and validation of automated, AI-generated programming tasks. Because these challenges serve as the foundation for model learning, automated tests are our "single source of truth."Errors made at this stage propagate at scale—which is why the level of criticality and the requirement for precision are extremely high. 
For each task, you will answer three fundamental questions:
Are the requirements clear and well-defined?Do the associated tests correctly validate those requirements?
Does a solution that passes the tests actually solve the proposed problem?

Project Languages:
You will need to evaluate and review tasks written in the following languages:
Primary: Python / JavaScript / TypeScriptSecondary: Go / Rust / Java

Ideal Profile:
This position is designed for Mid to Senior Software Engineers with real-world production environment experience.

Technical Requirements:
Proven professional experience in software development within production environments.
Hands-on experience conducting code reviews for other developers.
Solid mastery of automated testing—knowing exactly how tests validate (or fail to validate) code behavior.
Experience with open-source contributions or projects.
An active GitHub profile and an updated LinkedIn profile (Mandatory for application).
Fluency/comfort working entirely in English (reading and writing).

Nice-to-Haves (Differentials):
Experience with Test-Driven Development (TDD) or test design.
Familiarity with large or complex codebases.

Selection Process:
The process is 100% asynchronous, agile, and involves no live/synchronous interviews, fully respecting your time.
Phase 1: Application – Submit your profile via the form. We will evaluate your professional background, your GitHub, and your screening responses.
Phase 2: Technical Exercise – Shortlisted candidates will receive a brief practical test that simulates the day-to-day work of the project: reviewing generated code and assessing test validity. 
Performance in this stage is our primary selection criterion.
Passed both phases? You'll onboard directly into the project!

Apply Directly Here: https://bit.ly/recrutamentodevs

items.title: Add claudio: productivity tool for remote workers with voice dictation
items.description:
Repository: https://github.com/ayushkumar1808/claudio

claudio is a free, open-source macOS tool that enables system-wide voice dictation using your Claude subscription. Hold Space in any app (Slack, email, browser, terminal) to dictate text. Useful productivity tool for remote workers.

items.title: Hiring: AI Team Lead (Remote, ScholarshipOwl)
items.description:
We’re looking for a hands-on and strategic **AI Team Lead** to drive growth of our AI/ML capabilities at [ScholarshipOwl](https://scholarshipowl.com/).

What You’ll Do

- Lead a small, high-impact ML team
- Architect & deploy ML solutions (LLMs, RAG, CV, Recommenders)
- Collaborate with product & engineering
- Own the AI roadmap

Requirements

- 2+ years ML engineering
- Experience with deep learning, ML pipelines, and production
- Hands-on with LLMs / RAG / CV / Recommenders
- Remote-first communication skills

Why Join

- Mission-driven (help students access education)
- Remote, unlimited PTO
- $200/month home office budget
- Small team, high impact

👉 Apply here: https://careers.scholarshipowl.com/o/ai-team-lead
